task_completion.description: Create room boundaries with a door and window
task_completion.visual_evidence: A large rectangular shape representing the 20' x 15' room, with visual indicators, gaps, or labels for a door and a window.

task_completion.description: Add shapes for the Detective and Suspect actors
task_completion.visual_evidence: Shapes labeled 'Detective' and 'Suspect' placed inside the room boundaries.
A distinct section or box (often labeled 'Legend') containing symbols and corresponding text definitions for 'Fresnel', 'Leko', 'LED Panel', and 'Actor'.
5 distinct shapes representing lighting fixtures, labeled L1 through L5. The labels must include their Wattage/Type (e.g., Skypanel S60, Fresnel, Leko, bounce board, desk lamp) and Gel color.

task_completion.description: Connect all lights to a Distro Box with power cables
task_completion.visual_evidence: A shape labeled 'Distro Box' or 'Distro' with line connectors (representing power cables) linking it to all 5 lighting fixtures.

task_completion.description: Save as draw.io file and export as PDF
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io interface showing the filename 'lighting_plot_scene54.drawio' in the title bar, and evidence of PDF export (e.g., an export dialog, or a file manager showing both .drawio and .pdf files in the ~/Diagrams directory).

integrity.description: Agent used the draw.io graphical interface to create the diagram
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the draw.io application window with its toolbars, canvas, and menus, rather than a text editor or terminal generating XML.

integrity.description: Diagram consists of actual shapes and connectors
integrity.visual_evidence: The diagram contains actual shapes, text boxes, and connectors. Selection handles on shapes or distinct elements on the canvas should be visible, proving it is not just a pasted image.

integrity.description: Files were saved properly via GUI or standard export
integrity.visual_evidence: A file manager window or save/export dialog showing the ~/Diagrams directory with the created files, confirming they were not just created via terminal touch commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a lighting plot in draw.io. The diagram must contain at least 10 shapes. The 5 lighting fixtures are: L1 (Arri Skypanel S60), L2 (Fresnel), L3 (ETC Source 4 Leko 19°), L4 (bounce board fill), and L5 (desk lamp). Expected files are /home/ga/Diagrams/lighting_plot_scene54.drawio and /home/ga/Diagrams/lighting_plot_scene54.pdf.
